_comment: Representative mid-size grocery DC. Parameters derived from a real multi-site operation: order volume, lines-per-order, wave cadence, and the 24h arrival shape are statistically grounded (normalized/rounded); pick rates are set from operator-day counts + industry benchmarks because source transaction timestamps are date-grain (see README calibration notes).

automation._comment: Optional goods-to-person zone. When enabled, `line_coverage` of all order lines route to GTP pick stations instead of conventional zones (models SKU coverage of the automated system).
